chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. B.A. No.3566 of 2025 (Fazal Rabi @ Bacha vs. The State) Present: Mr. Justice Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro Mr. Justice Syed Fiaz-ul-Hassan Shah For hearing of bail application Date of hearing & order 04.02.2026 Mr. Subhan Javed, advocate for applicant Mr. Ali Haider Salim, Addl: PG Sindh O R D E R ----- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J:- Applicant is seeking post arrest bail in a case bearing Crime No.800/2021, registered at Police Station SITE-A, Karachi, u/s 6/9-C CNS Act, 1997, by means of this application. 2. Applicant was arrested on 25.11.2023 by a police team headed by SIP Ashraf Mughal of Police Station SITE-A Karachi, from Waleeka Ground Main Manghopir road, Karachi, and from him allegedly 2100 grams of charas was recovered. Hence, he was booked in the present case. 3. We have heard learned counsel for the applicant. It appears that he has pleaded his case for bail on the role of consistency, as two co-accused have been granted bail. Record shows that bail application of the applicant was dismissed in 2023 by a different judge, and now recently the bail has been granted to co-accused. Hence, on this fresh ground, the applicant has an opportunity to file a fresh bail application before the trial Court. Confronted with the same, learned counsel for the applicant does not press this bail application and seeks liberty to file the same before the trial Court, if so advised. Bail application stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Rafiq/PA
